description: Fix three online bugs: (1) Ryujin monster card skips placement, (2) Fujin movement not working, (3) Betray shows monster option without monsters in reserve
steps:
BUG 1 - Ryujin Monster Placement in Online Mode:

(A) In src/server/index.ts RYUJIN_BUY handler (line ~1615): After calling ryujinBuyCardFn, check if the bought card is a monster (cardType === 'monster'). If it IS a monster, set ryujinBuyActive: false but do NOT call advanceKamiResolution. Instead just broadcastState and wait for MONSTER_PLACED. If it is NOT a monster, proceed as before (advanceKamiResolution).

(B) In src/server/index.ts MONSTER_PLACED handler (line ~1223): After the existing monster placement logic (templeId/provinceId/reserve branches), add a check: if the game is in kamiResolutionActive state (and trainMandateActive is false), instead of advancing trainResolution, call advanceKamiResolution and do NOT advance trainResolutionIndex. The existing trainResolution advancement should only run when trainMandateActive is true.

(C) In src/store/gameStore.ts doRyujinBuyCard (line ~2294): After sending RYUJIN_BUY to the server, do NOT just return. Instead, apply ryujinBuyCard locally (same as hotseat) to check if the card is a monster. If it IS a monster, enter the monster placement UI flow (same pattern as doBuySeasonCard online mode at line ~1197): handle Komainu/Hotei special case (komainuChoiceVisible), Luna no-valid-province case, and normal monster placement popup. If NOT a monster, just return (server will advance).

BUG 2 - Fujin Movement Not Working in Online Mode:

In src/store/gameStore.ts GAME_STATE handler (around line ~3149): The uiResets block sets moveMode=false when marshalMandateActive is false. This kills Fujin movement mode. Add a condition: when the incoming state has kamiResolutionActive && kamiResolutionStep === 'interactive' && fujinMovesRemaining > 0, AND the local player is the kamiResolutionCurrentPlayerId, set uiResets.moveMode = true (instead of false). This should be checked AFTER the marshal reset block so it overrides the false. Also set moveFrom = null and selectedFigures = [].

BUG 3 - Betray Shows Monster Option Without Monsters in Reserve:

(A) In src/components/ActionPanel.tsx (line ~654, canDeployMonster computation): Add an additional check using player.monsters > 0. The current check only verifies undeployed monster cards exist but doesn't use the authoritative reserve count. Change to: `return cp.monsters > 0 && cp.seasonCards.some(card => card.cardType === 'monster' && !deployedMonsterCardIds.has(card.id));`

(B) In src/utils/gameLogic.ts betraySelectFigure function (line ~1451, monster validation block): Add check for issuer.monsters > 0 in addition to the existing hasUndeployedMonster check. This ensures the server also rejects betray-with-monster when reserve is 0. Change validation to: `if (!hasUndeployedMonster || issuer.monsters <= 0) return state;`
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes with no TypeScript errors
Server RYUJIN_BUY handler does not call advanceKamiResolution when the bought card is a monster
Server MONSTER_PLACED handler advances kami resolution (not train resolution) when kamiResolutionActive is true and trainMandateActive is false
Client doRyujinBuyCard for online mode enters monster placement UI flow when the card is a monster
GAME_STATE handler sets moveMode=true when receiving state with active Fujin interactive resolution for the local player
betraySelectFigure in gameLogic validates issuer.monsters > 0 for monster replacements
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm successful compilation with no errors
